0.name: Basic
0.note: No stat word printed; heart symbol on tan chip, purple card frame. Heart matches the dashboard HP area so classified vitality.

1.name: Basic
1.note: No stat word printed; teardrop symbol, green card frame. Classified endurance by symbol; could be skill.

2.name: Basic
2.note: No stat word printed; open-hand symbol, blue card frame. Classified skill by symbol; could be endurance.

3.name: Basic
3.note: Flexed-arm symbol, black card frame. Rulebook p22 example: the Basic Strength card raises Attack damage, matching this +1 {dmg} card.

0.name: Invigorating
0.text:
Dodge
Heal 1
Clear this or any other slot.
0.note: Teardrop symbol (same as Basic cell 1); stat word not printed.

1.name: Tactical
1.text:
Dodge
Attack or Dodge at +1 {speed}.
Clear this slot
1.note: Teardrop symbol. {speed} = single silver arrow icon (one speed step), distinct from the colored {fast}/{medium}/{slow} sets.

2.name: Dash
2.text:
Dodge
Clear this slot
When used to Move: Move 3 spaces.

3.name: Quick Change
3.text:
Dodge
May Transform Weapon for free after Attack or Dodge.

4.name: Counter Strike
4.text:
Dodge
After Dodging: Deal 2 {dmg} to that Enemy.

5.name: Cheap Shot
5.text:
Stagger
If an Enemy in your space uses Ability, discard from hand: Deal them 2 {dmg}.
5.note: Open-hand symbol (same as Basic cell 2); stat word not printed.

8.name: Agile
8.note: Open-hand symbol. {speed} = single silver arrow icon.

10.name: Swift
10.note: Flexed-arm symbol (same as Basic cell 3, pinned to Strength by rulebook p22 example). {speed} = single silver arrow icon.

11.name: Leaping
11.text:
+1 {dmg}
May make a Move action before using this card to Attack.

15.name: Tireless
15.text:
Draw 2, then discard 1 card.
Remove 1 {frenzy} or 1 {poison}.
15.note: Heart symbol (same as Basic cell 0). {frenzy} = spiral icon, {poison} = skull-in-droplet icon; both match the mod's Frenzy and Poison token art exactly.

17.name: Indomitable
17.text:
Draw 1
Cannot suffer Frenzy, Poison, Stagger, or Stun.

19.name: Second Wind
19.text:
When used for non-Attack action:
Heal 2
